parameters.query: SELECT id, nombre, slug FROM public.barberias WHERE (slug = $1 OR id = $2) AND deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS nombre, NULL AS slug LIMIT 1;

SELECT json_build_object(
  'barberia', (SELECT row_to_json(b) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.barberias WHERE id = $1) b),
  'servicios', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(s), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.servicios WHERE barberia_id = $1) s),
  'barberos', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(ba), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.barberos WHERE barberia_id = $1 ) ba),
  'horarios', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(h), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.horarios WHERE barberia_id = $1 ORDER BY dia_semana ASC) h),
  'clientes', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(cl), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.clientes_finales WHERE barberia_id = $1 ORDER BY id DESC) cl),
  'reservas', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(ci), '[]'::json) FROM (
      SELECT
        c.*,
        c.barberia_id AS dashboard_barberia_id,
        c.barbero_id AS dashboard_barbero_id,
        c.servicio_id AS dashboard_servicio_id,
        c.cliente_id AS dashboard_cliente_id,
        s.nombre AS servicio_nombre,
        s.precio AS precio, -- Selected s.precio to populate service price in the response!
        b.nombre AS barbero_nombre,
        COALESCE(cf.nombre, c.cliente_nombre) AS dashboard_cliente_nombre,
        COALESCE(cf.telefono, c.cliente_tel) AS dashboard_cliente_tel,
        p.id AS pago_id,
        p.total AS total_pagado,
        p.metodo AS metodo_pago,
        p.pagado_en AS pagado_en
      FROM public.citas c
      LEFT JOIN public.servicios s ON c.servicio_id = s.id
      LEFT JOIN public.barberos b ON c.barbero_id = b.id
      LEFT JOIN public.clientes_finales cf ON c.cliente_id = cf.id
      LEFT JOIN public.pagos p ON c.id = p.cita_id
      WHERE c.barberia_id = $1
      ORDER BY c.fecha DESC, c.hora_inicio DESC
    ) ci
  )
) AS result;
SELECT id, nombre, slug FROM public.barberias WHERE (slug = $1 OR id = $2) AND deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS nombre, NULL AS slug LIMIT 1;

SELECT json_build_object(
  'barberia', (SELECT row_to_json(b) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.barberias WHERE id = $1) b),
  'servicios', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(s), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.servicios WHERE barberia_id = $1) s),
  'barberos', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(ba), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.barberos WHERE barberia_id = $1 ) ba),
  'horarios', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(h), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.horarios WHERE barberia_id = $1 ORDER BY dia_semana ASC) h),
  'clientes', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(cl), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT * FROM public.clientes_finales WHERE barberia_id = $1 ORDER BY id DESC) cl),
  'reservas', (
    SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(ci), '[]'::json) FROM (
      SELECT
        c.*,
        c.barberia_id AS dashboard_barberia_id,
        c.barbero_id AS dashboard_barbero_id,
        c.servicio_id AS dashboard_servicio_id,
        c.cliente_id AS dashboard_cliente_id,
        s.nombre AS servicio_nombre,
        s.precio AS precio, -- Selected s.precio to populate service price in the response!
        b.nombre AS barbero_nombre,
        COALESCE(cf.nombre, c.cliente_nombre) AS dashboard_cliente_nombre,
        COALESCE(cf.telefono, c.cliente_tel) AS dashboard_cliente_tel,
        p.id AS pago_id,
        p.total AS total_pagado,
        p.metodo AS metodo_pago,
        p.pagado_en AS pagado_en
      FROM public.citas c
      LEFT JOIN public.servicios s ON c.servicio_id = s.id
      LEFT JOIN public.barberos b ON c.barbero_id = b.id
      LEFT JOIN public.clientes_finales cf ON c.cliente_id = cf.id
      LEFT JOIN public.pagos p ON c.id = p.cita_id
      WHERE c.barberia_id = $1
      ORDER BY c.fecha DESC, c.hora_inicio DESC
    ) ci
  )
) AS result;
